name: Egg Drop Soup
recipeIngredient: 3.5 oz Packet chicken noodle soup mix (2 envelopes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the hot water into a deep, 2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole and heat, covered, in the microwave for 10 minutes or until boiling.
2. Add the noodle soup mix and heat, covered, for an additional 4 minutes. Allow to stand for 4 to 5 minutes or until noodles and chicken are tender.
3. Gradually pour the beaten eggs into the soup mixture while stirring with a fork. Heat, uncovered, for 2 to 3 minutes or until the eggs are cooked. Stir frequently with a fork to make the eggs form thin strings.
4. If desired, stir in the soy sauce. Garnish with fried noodles.
